description: country in Central Europe
description_wiki: Germany, officially the Federal Republic of Germany, is a country in Western and Central Europe.

description: town in Main-Kinzig-Kreis in Hesse, Germany
description_wiki: Schlüchtern (German pronunciation: [ˈʃlʏçtɐn] ) is a town in the Main-Kinzig district, in Hessen, Germany.

description: human settlement in Germany
county in Pennsylvania, United States
description_wiki: Lawrence County is a county in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.

description: county in Pennsylvania, United States
description_wiki: Beaver County is a county in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.

description: 1861–1865 civil war in the United States between the North and the South over the enslavement of African-Americans
description_wiki: The American Civil War (April 12, 1861 – May 26, 1865; also known by other names) was a civil war in the United States between the Union ("the North") and the Confederacy ("the South"), which was formed in 1861 by states that had seceded from the Union to preserve slavery in the United States, which they saw as threatened because of the election of Abraham Lincoln and the growing abolitionist movement in the North.

description: land force that fought for the Union during the American Civil War
United States National Historic Site near Andersonville, Georgia
description_wiki: Andersonville Prison (also known as Camp Sumter), located near Andersonville, Georgia, was a Confederate prisoner-of-war camp during the final fourteen months of the American Civil War.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Pennsylvania, officially the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, is a U.S. state located in the Mid-Atlantic, Northeastern, Appalachian, and Great Lakes regions of the United States.

description: borough in counties Lawrence, and Beaver, Pennsylvania, United States
description_wiki: Ellwood City is a borough primarily in Lawrence County, Pennsylvania, United States.

description: city and county seat in Allegheny County, Pennsylvania, United States
description_wiki: Pittsburgh ( PITS-burg) is a city in Allegheny County, Pennsylvania, United States, and its county seat.

description: city in and county seat of Cuyahoga County, Ohio, United States
description_wiki: Cleveland ( KLEEV-lənd) is a city in the U.S. state of Ohio and the county seat of Cuyahoga County.

description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.

description: neighborhood in San Francisco, California, United States
description_wiki: The Sunset District is a neighborhood located on the West Side of San Francisco, California, United States.

description: earthquake in California, US
description_wiki: The 1957 San Francisco earthquake  (also known as the Daly City earthquake of 1957) occurred on March 22 at 11:44:22 local time with a moment magnitude of 5.7 and a maximum Mercalli Intensity of VII (Very strong).

aliases: Great San Francisco Earthquake and Fire
description: major earthquake that struck San Francisco and the coast of Northern California
description_wiki: The 1906 San Francisco earthquake was a major earthquake which struck the coast of Northern California at 05:12 am Pacific Standard Time on Wednesday, April 18, 1906.

description: city in Humboldt County, California, United States
description_wiki: Arcata (; Wiyot: Goudi’ni; Yurok: Oket'oh) is a city adjacent to the Arcata Bay (northern) portion of Humboldt Bay in Humboldt County, California, United States.

description: city in San Mateo County, California, United States
description_wiki: Belmont is a city in San Mateo County, California, United States.

description: city in Alameda County, California, United States
city in Contra Costa County, California, United States
description_wiki: Concord ( KON-kerd) is the most populous city in Contra Costa County, California, United States.

description: city and county seat of Alameda County, California, United States
description_wiki: Oakland is a city in the East Bay region of the San Francisco Bay Area in the U.S. state of California.
